title: Random Hypothetical Character Siblings
wikitext:
[]: Random Hypothetical: Character Siblings             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Sep 07, 2008 8:51 pm If the characters had siblings (excluding Toji, Hikari, and other characters that I am not thinking of at the moment, of course, because they already have siblings), what would they be like and how many would they have? My opinion: Shinji: Maybe one blood sister, younger and still lives with sensai. And of course, Rei is his sister, if you really think about it. (Sorry S/R shippers) Rei: DUH! Asuka: I would say she has no blood siblings, but has numerous half siblings from Langley and the doctor. Misato: I can't remember if it is mentioned that she has other siblings, but she would have two, a brother and a sister, most likely younger. And I can't think of anything else at the moment, so carry on from that.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Sep 07, 2008 8:54 pm I bet Mari will turn out to be Shinji's sister. She looks just like Yui, IMO. I bet Gendou intended for her to be the pilot of Unit 01, which is why he refers to Shinji as a "spare."

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Sep 07, 2008 8:57 pm REQUEST: Please no Rebuild in this thread!!!

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Sun Sep 07, 2008 8:59 pm Damn Mari speculation thread is closed. Therefor I'll put my theory here now, Mari will turn out to be the child her mom said she had to be better than in the manga, volume 9. Sorry had to be put somewhere. Anyways, I think Asuka should have an annoying little sister

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Sep 07, 2008 9:03 pm I don't care if that damn thread is closed, Rebuild goes in the Rebuild forum And yes, Asuka probably would hate her other siblings.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Sep 07, 2008 9:15 pm Curses! Foiled again!

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Sep 07, 2008 9:51 pm I think it's important to his character that Shinji believe he is an only child, even if he isn't. Thus even if he does have full, half, or adopted siblings he likely will not recognize them as such... enabling Greek tragedy to commence. Rei works fine for this though, so no need for anyone else. I rather like the idea of Asuka having several younger, happier siblings from her father's remarriage that she actively despises, despite barely knowing them due to living with NERV trainers and going to college. Say a pair of bratty twin brothers around eight years old and a sister in preschool, who are conflicted between wanting to understand their oh-so-important sister and knowing that she's a giant pain in the ass. I imagine they look nothing at all like her. Misato could do with an older brother, someone who disapproves of her lifestyle and career choices vehemently. A holier-than-though environmentalist/vegan/anti-war political activist type with a strong self-righteous streak and a cold Gendo-like temper. Much like her dad. Maya needs an older sister who is far more obviously feminine and outgoing, the type who would tease and generate massive insecurities in her as a child. Like Misato, but less chemically unstable. Gendo had a younger sister, but she was raped repeatedly and beaten to death by their drug-abusing father when they were teens. Gendo reported the crime anonymously and ran away from home, living as a vagrant squatter and later a gangbanger until he too was arrested years later and sent back to live with his now single mother.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 07, 2008 10:15 pm Hyuuga has a long lost father, who died in a London apartment in 1970 under mysterious circumstances, probably by overdose.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Sep 07, 2008 10:29 pm @NemZ: I like everything you said, except for the part about Shinji. This is hypothetical after all. The the part about Gendo really explains a lot of how Gendo is. It make him out to be a good guy underneath the hundreds of miles of evilness. @CC: siblings man, but what you said could be valid as well, if he were in the band The Doors.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun Sep 07, 2008 10:55 pm I think Shinji might have siblings, he just doesn't know about them. Yet. Sorry, AB. @Gendou's sister: yeah, that sounds about right. Some really awful stuff must happened to Gendou, to make him the evil genius we know and love. Maybe he'll given a backstory in Re-

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Sep 07, 2008 11:30 pm Am I beating a dead horse? Because I know you are! oh well. Here is a little something I have been concocting for a while now: What if Asuka had an older brother? He would have started out as the love child of Langley and Asuka's mom when they were young. Kyoko was a freshman in college and met Langley, they liked each other a lot and of course had unprotected sex. This was bad for the relationship and for Kyoko, who had a budding college career. She was then out of school for 10 months, and had a baby boy, named Albert. Langley was not around, due to his fright of getting a girl pregnant during his senior year of college. During the tenth month of leaving college, Kyoko managed to get Langley to come talk to her and discuss what to do with Albert. They decided to put him up for adoption and continue with their careers. Baby Albert went to the loving family of the Wegeners, and grew up by himself with no other siblings. Soon later, after college was over, Kyoko and Langley got married and had Asuka. Albert Wilhelm Wegener went to military school in Berlin and was regarded as a prodigy. During the time of Asuka's eva piloting, he became a lieutenant in the Deutschland Sicherheit-Verteidigung Kraft(Germany Security-Defense Force) under the command of Nerv's german branch. He has no recollection of have a sister at all (or does he....). Edit: Oh, and his appearance is kind of like mine. See pictures thread for details.* *Yeah, I should write a fanfic, but I am way to lazy to do so, and I have no time here at college*

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 07, 2008 11:40 pm Action_Bastard wrote: @CC: siblings man, but what you said could be valid as well, if he were in the band The Doors.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Sun Sep 07, 2008 11:50 pm Probably someone like Konata.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Sep 08, 2008 6:02 pm Shinji would have a younger sister named Rei. :) Asuka? Maybe some half siblings from Langley and Stepmother getting freaky, as long as it's none of the shit from the manga. Kaji apparently has a brother if I'm remembering the manga correctly... And Misato? She'd have a tomboy of a sister named Kaworu. And Misato, Kaworu and Akira would all live happily ever after and--- er...never mind. That's Reichu's gig but it's a "cute" idea anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Mon Sep 08, 2008 9:04 pm Action_Bastard wrote: Am I beating a dead horse? Because I know you are!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Mon Sep 08, 2008 9:13 pm Hence why I said you were.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Sep 08, 2008 11:53 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: And Misato? She'd have a tomboy of a sister named Kaworu. And Misato, Kaworu and Akira would all live happily ever after and--- er...never mind. That's Reichu's gig but it's a "cute" idea anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Sep 09, 2008 12:35 am @Reichu: This is supposed to be hypothetical, not logical. But I do understand what you are saying.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Sep 09, 2008 9:34 am Ornette is my brother from another mother.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Sep 09, 2008 2:36 pm Action_Bastard wrote: @Reichu: This is supposed to be hypothetical, not logical. But I do understand what you are saying.
